ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the television show */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network where the show is broadcast */,
  "show_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the show started airing */,
  "show_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the show ended (if applicable) */,
  "show_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show */,
  "show_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the show */,
  "show_status" TEXT /* Current status of the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "network_website" TEXT /* URL of the network's official website */,
  "network_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the network */,
  "network_founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was founded */,
  "network_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" TEXT /* Episode number (e.g., S01E02) */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "demo_rating" REAL /* Demographic rating of the episode */,
  "total_rating" REAL /* Total rating of the episode */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "episode_air_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode aired */,
  "episode_runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "episode_synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the episode */,
  "episode_director" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "episode_writer" TEXT /* Writer of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode the data belongs to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the viewers (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "viewers_count" INTEGER /* Number of viewers in the specified age group */,
  "viewers_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the viewers */,
  "viewers_income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the viewers */,
  "viewers_education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the viewers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, executive, network manager) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical rating entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode the rating belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "demo_rating" REAL /* Demographic rating on the specified date */,
  "total_rating" REAL /* Total rating on the specified date */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
